nodes.name: WebflowDesignFetcher
nodes.description: Obtain OAuth token via secrets fabric, fetch design from Webflow API, validate frame ownership

nodes.name: ComponentHierarchyTraverser
nodes.description: Recursively traverse component hierarchy with cycle detection (max depth 50)

nodes.name: CyclicHierarchyValidator
nodes.description: Validate cycle-free structure, detect infinite parent-child chains, return error if cyclic

nodes.name: ComponentNormalizer
nodes.description: Normalize nested components to flat list with parentId references

nodes.name: CssSelectorParser
nodes.description: Parse CSS selectors, extract classes, canonicalize to class list format

nodes.name: FrameScopedAggregator
nodes.description: Aggregate all components and styles with frameId context, ensure frame isolation

nodes.name: DesignValidationGate
nodes.description: Validate all transformations complete, frame ownership confirmed, emit DesignFetched

nodes.name: OutboxPublisher
nodes.description: Emit CloudEvents to queue fabric after all storage (DNA-8 outbox pattern)
